text: What is the typical time complexity of accessing an element in an array?
explanation: Accessing an array element by index is a constant time operation.

text: If a train 100m long crosses a bridge 200m long in 20 seconds, what is the speed of the train?
explanation: Total distance = Length of train + Length of bridge = 100 + 200 = 300m. Speed = Distance/Time = 300/20 = 15 m/s.
